title: CSLB Law & Business — Practice (example schema)
note: Original practice questions in the style of the exam. NOT actual exam questions. Verify all figures against the current CSLB study guide.

questions.question: As of 2026, what is the required amount of the contractor's license bond in California?
questions.explanation: Under Business & Professions Code 7071.6, the contractor's license bond is $25,000 (set by SB 607, effective Jan 1, 2023).

questions.question: A contractor's license is generally required once the aggregate price of a project (labor and materials) reaches:
questions.explanation: AB 2622 raised the minor-work exemption threshold from $500 to $1,000, effective Jan 1, 2025 (B&P Code 7048). Work at or above $1,000 requires a license.

questions.question: On a home improvement contract, the down payment may not exceed:
options: 10% of the contract price or $1,000, whichever is less
questions.explanation: California limits the home improvement down payment to $1,000 or 10% of the contract price, whichever is less.
